name: failed-six-steps-dialog

turns.user: I want to have eight minute warmup eight minutes cool down in between. I want to have exactly 6 steps. Each step should be one minute long and they should alter rest work.

name: blocks-mean-pairs
description: Blocks/rounds/cycles are repeated pairs, unlike steps.

turns.user: Warmup 8 min, then 8 alternating blocks of 1 minute rest and 1 minute work, then 8 min cooldown

name: rounds-mean-pairs
description: Six rounds should create six work/rest pairs.

turns.user: Give me an 8 minute warmup and 8 minute cooldown with 6 rounds of 1 min hard then 1 min rest
